title: ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. elbursensis
intro: Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. elbursensis, also known as Elburz ziziphora, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elburz ziziphora include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Elburz ziziphora include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
